description: Benchmark reference fixture for winter signed component totals with a separate infiltration split.
method: Energy Calculation Parity / Annual 8760 Energy Balance Signed Components
sourceReference: Internal benchmark reference values derived from constant signed hourly component loads with separate infiltration; no external parity claim.
assumptions: Magnitude component fields are aggregated as non-negative kWh.
Net component fields preserve the sign of hourly balance values.
Infiltration is provided as a separate hourly component and is not included in VentilationW.
notes: This fixture verifies deterministic signed infiltration component benchmark comparison.
